summary: Completed comprehensive testing of access control, logo upload, user app assignment, and UI features. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend tests passed (100%). Key features verified: 1) Unassigned user (raghul) sees NO apps in launcher, 2) Assigned user (suriya) sees Kissflow in launcher, 3) App Catalog shows correct access status, 4) Logo upload endpoint works, 5) User forms have app assignment checkboxes, 6) Admin dashboard shows all stats and quick actions.
passed_tests: Admin login (gowtham.s@refex.co.in) works correctly
Assigned user login (suriya.v@refex.co.in) works correctly
Unassigned user login (raghul.je@refex.co.in) works correctly
Unassigned user (raghul) sees NO apps in launcher - shows 'No Apps Available'
Assigned user (suriya) sees Kissflow in launcher
Admin always sees all apps in launcher
App Catalog: Unassigned user sees 'Request Access' button for Kissflow
App Catalog: Assigned user sees 'Access Granted' for Kissflow
POST /api/upload/logo accepts image file and returns logo_url
POST /api/upload/logo rejects non-image files with 400 error
GET /api/apps/saml/{app_id}/users returns assigned users
POST /api/apps/saml/{app_id}/users assigns user to app
DELETE /api/apps/saml/{app_id}/users/{user_id} removes user from app
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns all required stat fields
GET /api/apps/saml returns apps with approved_user_ids field
GET /api/users returns user list with correct structure
Refex logo visible in sidebar
Admin dashboard shows 8 stat cards
Admin dashboard shows 6 quick action cards
Users page shows app badges per user in table
User creation form has app assignment checkboxes
User edit form has app assignment checkboxes
SAML Apps page shows Kissflow with user count
SAML app form has logo upload input (file upload, not URL)
critical_code_review_comments: Access control logic in check_user_app_access() correctly checks approved_user_ids, allowed_group_ids, and allowed_role_ids
org_admin users always have access to all apps (correct behavior)
Logo upload endpoint validates image content type and file size (5MB limit)
Users.js correctly implements app assignment in both create and edit forms
AppCatalog.js correctly shows has_access status from /api/catalog/apps endpoint
AppLauncher.js correctly filters apps based on user access from /api/launcher/apps endpoint
seed_data_creation: Fixed raghul.je@refex.co.in password hash and removed from Kissflow approved_user_ids for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All access control features working correctly. Key verified behaviors: 1) Users only see apps they are assigned to in launcher (via approved_user_ids), 2) org_admin users always see all apps, 3) App Catalog shows correct has_access status, 4) Logo upload via file input works, 5) User forms have app assignment checkboxes. Test users: raghul (unassigned - sees no apps), suriya (assigned - sees Kissflow), gowtham (admin - sees all).

verified_features.access_control_launcher: Users only see assigned apps - raghul sees 0 apps, suriya sees Kissflow
verified_features.access_control_catalog: Correct status shown - raghul sees 'Request Access', suriya sees 'Access Granted'
verified_features.logo_upload: POST /api/upload/logo accepts images, returns URL, rejects non-images
verified_features.user_forms_app_assignment: Both create and edit user forms have app assignment checkboxes
verified_features.admin_dashboard: 8 stat cards and 6 quick action cards displayed
verified_features.saml_form_logo_upload: File input for logo upload (not URL input)
